texto: A lost sheep needs a shepherd to find the way
autor: if you don't believe you are a lost sheep then you will always want because you will never find the way. Psalm 23:1.
explicacao: Citação de if you don't believe you are a lost sheep then you will always want because you will never find the way. Psalm 23:1. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “A lost sheep needs a shepherd to find the way” articula reflexao, felix-wantang, sheep em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
